title: Green Blade GN202 Black Garden & Pond Netting - 2m x 4m - 1cm Mesh
features: This netting is UV stabilised for long life making it reusable, rot proof & strong. It has reinforced edges for secure, tangle free fixing.
It is suitable for protecting fruit & vegetables from birds & butterflies, plus also pond fish from various predators such as herons & will help to keep pond water free from autumn leaves.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product Description Green Blade netting is UV stabilised for long life making it reusable, rot proof and strong. It has reinforced edges for secure, tangle free fixing. It is suitable for protecting fruit, vegetables and ponds from various predators such as birds and will help to keep pond water free from autumn leaves. Protects pond fish from herons and other predators. Polybag with colour insert packaging. Net measures 4m length by 2m height. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
